must_detect.matched_text: Under the Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) and NPC circulars, we conducted a breach assessment and submitted a preliminary report via the NPC Data Breach Notification Management System.

Incident Report: Cyber and Operational Update for Banaba Coast Retail Holdings, Inc. (PH Issuer)
On 15 May 2026, our security monitoring flagged anomalous login attempts on the HR self-service portal; containment was completed within two hours.
We filed an SEC Form 17-C and posted a notice on the PSE EDGE portal on 16 May; the disclosure is already public and not expected to be material to a reasonable investor.
No core finance systems, card processors, or e-wallet integrations were accessed; tests indicate no exposure of PESONet or InstaPay credentials.
Under the Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) and NPC circulars, we conducted a breach assessment and submitted a preliminary report via the NPC Data Breach Notification Management System.
